basic_details.job_title: BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) has released the official Apprentice Notification 2026. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced under the BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with 10th class with minimum 40% marks and ITI in the respective trade for Lineman and Electrician, and 8th class pass for Gardner, can apply online till 11-06-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th class with minimum 40% marks and ITI in respective trade for Lineman and Electrician, 8th class pass for Gardner
qualification.details: Lineman: Passed 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Lineman trade from NCVT/SCVT. Electrician: Passed 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Electrician trade from NCVT/SCVT. Gardner: Passed 8th class examination from recognised school or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary/stipend details.

selection_process: Merit List based on 10th and ITI marks Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BBMB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the BBMB Apprentice recruitment is 11th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Apprentice post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies for the Apprentice post in the Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Lineman post?
faq.answer: For the Lineman post, candidates must have passed the 10th class with a minimum of 40% marks and possess a National Trade Certificate in the Lineman trade from NCVT/SCVT.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the BBMB Apprentice recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these apprentice positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the creation of a merit list based on 10th and ITI marks, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for BBMB Apprentice jobs?
faq.answer: The application mode for the BBMB Apprentice recruitment is strictly online through the official BBMB website.

faq.question: Q7. Which trades are available for the Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: The available trades for the Apprentice positions are Lineman, Electrician, and Gardner.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of Bhakra Beas Management Board?
faq.answer: The official website of Bhakra Beas Management Board is https://bbmb.gov.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and application.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this BBMB Apprentice recruitment is 01/2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The job type for the Apprentice posts in BBMB is contractual.
